title: Deep Fried Chinese Baked Beans Dumplings
description: A yeasty, gooey, Chinese dish featuring baked beans, deep fried to perfection, suitable for a sick day, with ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, salt, sugar, and 1/4 cup of warm water in a bowl to make the dough
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
Let the dough rest for 1 hour in a warm place
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place 1 tablespoon of baked beans in the center
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half moon shape and press the edges together to seal
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees
Deep fry the dumplings for 3-4 minutes on each side until they are golden brown
Drain the dumplings on paper towels and brush with sesame oil
Sprinkle chopped scallions and grated ginger on top of the dumplings
